title: Separate the Digits in an Array
titleCn: 分割数组中数字的数位

testcases.input: nums = [13,25,83,77] Output: [1,3,2,5,8,3,7,7] Explanation: - The separation of 13 is [1,3]. - The separation of 25 is [2,5]. - The separation of 83 is [8,3]. - The separation of 77 is [7,7]. answer = [1,3,2,5,8,3,7,7]. Note that answer contains the separations in the same order.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,3,2,5,8,3,7,7] Explanation: - The separation of 13 is [1,3]. - The separation of 25 is [2,5]. - The separation of 83 is [8,3]. - The separation of 77 is [7,7]. answer = [1,3,2,5,8,3,7,7]. Note that answer contains the separations in the same order.

testcases.input: nums = [7,1,3,9] Output: [7,1,3,9] Explanation: The separation of each integer in nums is itself. answer = [7,1,3,9].
testcases.expectedOutput: [7,1,3,9] Explanation: The separation of each integer in nums is itself. answer = [7,1,3,9].
